item.title: The Book Which Tells The Truth
item.description: The first book by Raël, the written testimony of his first several encounters with Yahweh. Read it for yourself # 📖 Rael I — The Book Which Tells The Truth See also # Resources › Extraterrestrials Took Me To Their Planet Wiki › Raëlism External links # Download The Message | rael.org

item.title: Extraterrestrials Took Me To Their Planet
item.description: The second book by Raël, also a written testimony of another encounter with Yahweh where he was taken to another planet. Read it for yourself # 📖 Rael II — Extraterrestrials Took Me To Their Planet See also # Resources › The Book Which Tells The Truth Wiki › Raëlism External links # Download The Message | rael.org

item.title: Ces Dieux qui firent le Ciel et la Terre
item.description: See also # Wiki › Neo-Euhemerism Resources › The Coming Of The Gods by Jean Sendy Resources › Those Gods Who Made Heaven and Earth by Jean Sendy External links # La Lune Clé de la Bible

item.title: Fingerprints of the Gods: The Evidence of Earth's Lost Civilization
item.description: See also # Wiki › Neo-Euhemerism Resources › L'Ère du Verseau: Fin de l'Illusion Humaniste by Jean Sendy [FR] Resources › Those Gods Who Made Heaven and Earth by Jean Sendy External links # Fingerprint of the Gods | Wikipedia The Coming Of The Gods | Google Books The Coming Of The Gods | GoodReads

item.title: L'Ère du Verseau: la Fin de l'Illusion Humaniste
item.description: A non-fiction book about the Aquarian Age and how that relates to the possibility of the biblical creation myth being extraterrestrial in nature. Read it for yourself # 📖 L'Ère du Verseau, la Fin de l'Illusion Humaniste See also # Wiki › Neo-Euhemerism Resources › The Coming Of The Gods by Jean Sendy Resources › Those Gods Who Made Heaven and Earth by Jean Sendy External links # L'Ère du Verseau: Fin de l'Illusion Humaniste | Google Books

item.title: Escaping from Eden: Does Genesis teach that the human race was created by God or engineered by ETs?
La Bibbia non è un libro sacro
